verses.2: “Shall he who argues contend with the Almighty?
verses.4: “Behold, I am of small account. What will I answer you?
verses.5: I have spoken once, and I will not answer;
verses.6: Then the LORD answered Job out of the whirlwind:
verses.8: Will you even annul my judgment?
verses.9: Or do you have an arm like God?
verses.10: “Now deck yourself with excellency and dignity.
verses.11: Pour out the fury of your anger.
verses.12: Look at everyone who is proud, and humble him.
verses.13: Hide them in the dust together.
verses.14: Then I will also admit to you
verses.15: “See now behemoth, which I made as well as you.
verses.16: Look now, his strength is in his thighs.
verses.17: He moves his tail like a cedar.
verses.18: His bones are like tubes of bronze.
verses.19: He is the chief of the ways of God.
verses.20: Surely the mountains produce food for him,
verses.21: He lies under the lotus trees,
verses.22: The lotuses cover him with their shade.
verses.23: Behold, if a river overflows, he doesn’t tremble.
verses.24: Shall any take him when he is on the watch,
